items.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
items.dek: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.
items.body: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'I will sleep with fear': Romanians shaken after block of flats hit by drone
items.dek: A Russian drone hit a block of flats in Romania on Friday, causing a fire and injuring two people, Romanian officials say.
items.body: A Russian drone hit a block of flats in Romania on Friday, causing a fire and injuring two people, Romanian officials say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
items.dek: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.
items.body: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.
items.author: IriLine Desk
